name: Kaysan Abu Amra
title: The Sword of Vengeance
shortDescription: The decisive and uncompromising commander of Mukhtar's police force who executed many of the main killers of Imam Hussain (AS).
fullStory: Kaysan, known as Abu Amra, was from the Mawali (Persians residing in Kufa) and one of Mukhtar al-Thaqafi's most loyal companions. He served as the commander of Mukhtar's special guard (Shurta). Kaysan was the primary agent responsible for hunting down, capturing, and executing the murderers of the Karbala martyrs. He surrounded the houses of criminals like Shimr, Khawli, and Umar ibn Sa'd, bringing them to justice. His name was so terrifying among the killers of Karbala that he was likened to a "hunting falcon".
quoteArabic: لا ينجو من قتلة الحسين (ع) أحد من سيف العدالة.
quote: None of the killers of Hussain (AS) shall escape the sword of justice.
